expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Add persistent notification read state, list controls, and filtering.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Persist notification read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification read state saved across sessions so that unread and read items stay consistent when I return.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification records persist read and unread state per user",
        "Existing unread notifications default to unread until changed by the user",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/models/notification.ts",
        "db/migrations/*notification-read-state*.sql"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Show unread badge and open notification list",
      "description": "As a user, I want an unread badge and notification center entry point so that I can see when attention is needed and open my notifications quickly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Navigation or header shows unread notification count when unread items exist",
        "Clicking the notification entry point opens the notification center list",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/layout/HeaderNotifications.tsx",
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationCenter.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Mark notifications read or unread",
      "description": "As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so that I can manage which items still need attention.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Each notification item provides read and unread actions",
        "Changing read state updates persisted notification state for the current user",
        "Unread badge count updates after read-state changes",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationItem.tsx",
        "src/server/notifications/updateNotificationReadState.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Filter notification list by read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so that I can focus on unread or previously handled items.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification center provides filter options for All, Unread, and Read",
        "Changing the filter updates the visible notification list without mutating notification data",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationFilters.tsx",
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationCenter.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Clear all read notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so that I can remove completed items from my list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification center provides a clear action that targets only read notifications",
        "Clear action removes or archives read notifications while leaving unread notifications intact",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationCenterToolbar.tsx",
        "src/server/notifications/clearReadNotifications.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
